required_evidence: README Crash Site MVP scope confirmation
changed gameplay or governance files list
unit tests when behavior changes, including isolated gameplay logic
integration tests when systems interact, including inventory, crafting, mission, enemy, save, HUD, beacon, victory, or defeat

mission smoke test or documented manual procedure covering relevant spawn, resource collection, crafting, Galaxabrain Scout combat, component retrieval, beacon activation, victory, defeat, and save continuation checkpoints
manual Godot playtest note or procedure for movement, combat, objective clarity, or game-feel claims
runtime flags or logs when applicable
scope_warnings: Do not add forbidden MVP features while fixing the bug.
Runtime tests do not replace manual mission smoke evidence.
task_description: Add or harden full playable Crash Site MVP loop smoke test covering spawn, resource collection, crafting, Galaxabrain Scout combat, component retrieval, save point, beacon activation, victory, defeat, and save continuation.
